titleStmt.title: SII 11.127: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 127. (B.K. No. 128 of 1926-27.) KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR A WELL CALLED UPPUNĪRINA-BHĀVI.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya. VI) and registers a gift of income accruing from fines on offences such as defamation, assault, etc., made, for the benefit of the Kaḍalegeṟe tank, to the Ūroḍeya and the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra Kuṟitakūṁṭe by Mahāpradhāna, Manevergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Vāmadēvayya, an officer under Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Trailōkyamalla Vīra-Noḻaṁba-Pallava Permāḍi Jayasiṅgadēva, ‘of the Pallava family,’ who, as Yuvarāja, was ruling over Purigeṟe Three-Hundred, Beḷuvala Three-Hundred, Banavāsi Twelve-Thousand and Kundūr One-Thousand. The Ūroḍeya and the Two-Hundred Mahājanas also made a gift of land for the tank and for the temple of Aṇuvēśvaradēva. The inscription was composed by Nāgadēva of the vipra-grāma Poṁboḷal, written by Kuḷakaraṇi Mābalārya and engraved by Ayyaṇa, son of Kaṇṭada Bamma of the t own of Purikara.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 7, Dundubhi, Pushya, śu. 3, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta, regularly corresponding to A.D. 1082, December 25, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tadanu
jaṁ . māḷavacōḷādhipakalidōrdaḷenamaṁ māḍi nijabhujabaḷadiṁdēḷise noḷaṁbabaḷavaṁ pāḷise yuvarājanāgi sakaḷāvaniyaṁ . ©©
svasti samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamāna lōkavikhyāta pallavānvaya śrīmahīvallabha yuvarāja rājaparameṁśvaraṁ vīramāhēśvaraṁ vi
kramābharaṇaṁ jeyalakṣmīramaṇaṁ śaraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇētra kṣatriyapavitraṁ mattagajāṁgarā
jaṁ sahajamanōjaṁ ripurāyakaṭakasūṟekāṟaṁ naṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalla vīranoḷaṁbapallava permāḍi jaya
siṁgadēvar purigeṟemūnūṟuṁ beḷvolamunūṟuṁ banavāsipannircchāsiramuṁ kundūrssāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśi
ṣṭapratipāḷanaṁgeydu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgayyuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . vṛtta . manasijanikṣucāpa
menisi rppatimugdhavidagdhakāminījanake manōjarājanibhaneṁbudu vaṁdijanakke sūryya naṁdanani nanūnadānayutaneṁbudu
durddharavīravairigiṁdrana sutaniṁda mattyadhikaneṁbaṁdaṁ dhāriṇi vāmadēvana . pari pratibhāmaṇi nīti
śāstravibrājita vīra vikramacaḷukya vibhūṣaṇamāgi nagartte neṁdī jaga
meyde kīrtippudu kṣatracamūpati vāmadēvana . patihita pati hitanākhagādhi
patiyiṁ dinanāthatanūjanāda nākpatisuta vasudhe vi racamūpati
vāmadēvana . dēvadvijagurubhaktiyoḷa camūpati śikhāmaṇi yenipaṁ kēvaḷame vā
madaṇḍādhīśa . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ vidvajjanābhīṣṭaphaḷadā
yakaṁ śikhaṇḍamaṇḍanamāṇikya necaḷitavākya napratihata saṁpūrṇakarṇna kathākarṇnana karṇnāvataṁ
sa nuttarēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasāda śrīmattrailōkyamalla vīranoḷaṁbapallava permmāḍi jayasiṁgadēvara pādārādhakanuṁ
sujanaradēvaṁ nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ vāmadēvayyaṁ
gaḷ . sakaḷavyākaraṇārtthaśāstravidarī vēdārttha rssujanōpa vyāpāra rindharmaśāstra
rṇnanatatparapravararī śiṣṭēṣṭa vidvāṁśapūjā mukuḻarakṣā dhātriyoḷ .
hantadī yāgama hōmā
nadakkenduṁ migilenipa
ṟitakūṁṭeya viprarkkaṁ pūjārtthavārāvuḷa nēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛtamu
khakamaḷavinirggata vēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgānēkaśāstrāṣṭādaśasmṛtipurāṇa kṣaṇa ryyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇaparāyaṇa rvviditavēdārtthavidyāpāragar ṣaṭkarmmanirata rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapa
vitrīkritaśarīra rpparamaparōpakāriga ḷāśritajanakaḷpavṛkṣa rēkavākya rdduṣṭanigrahavi śiṣṭapratipāḷakara
ppa śrīmadagrahāraṁ kuṟitakūṁṭeyūroḍeyapramukha mahājanavinnūrvvarggaṁ śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakā
laṁ 7 neya dundubhi saṁvatsarada puṣya su 3 Ādityavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpātadandu śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ vāmadēvayyaṁ pādaprakṣāḷanaṁgeydu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi kaḍalege
ṟege pūrvvadoḷnaḍeva daṇḍadōṣa koḷa jō ḷamumaṁ punardattimāḍi biṭṭa . kaṁda . Iṟi
daḍa panneraḍu paṇaṁ kaḻdu bandu poydaḍāṟu paṇamu daṁḍaṁ neṟe baydaḍe mūṟu paṇaṁ kaṟe�nduṁ daṇḍamāgi naḍevu
du niyata . Enitondu koḷadhānyamavanituṁ teṟeyi vāridhiyaṁ dhikkarisuvudene negaṟdīka
ḍalegeṟege naḍevudadenduṁ . vacanaṁ . mattaṁ kaḍalegeṟegūra baḍagalarakeṟeya ya baḍagaṇa bhāgadalliṭṭageya
riyiṁ mūḍa lūroḍeya pramukha mahājanaminnūrvvaruṁ sarvvanamaśyamā girppatta nālu gēṇa kōlo ḷbiṭṭa mattarppanneraḍu
mattavā keyya baḍagaṇa bhāgadalu kaḷasavaḷḷiyara śaṁkimayyaninnūrvvargge dravyapūrvvakaṁ māḍi kaḍalegeṟege sarvvanama
śyamāgi biṭṭa mattarnnālku Antuṁ mattar 16 ma ninnūrvvaru mūruṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvarā taṭākamedōreṁtene .
Atimadhuraṁ prasannakavi nirmmisidunnatakāvyadante nirvvṛtiyutameyde mōkṣadavolcitta janappana cittadanta santata
matinirmmaḷaṁ peṟaranendu mapēkṣisutirppanante tānatilaghuvennadī caṇakadudgataṭākamanāro baṇnisar . bāvi
sa mūrtti sōmakaḷeyandade sōbhisutirppudī jagatpāvanamaṁbujōdaranivāsapayōnidhiyante tīvi sēvyāva
hamāgi raṁjipudu jīvana�ṁ narajīvarāsigaḷjīvipuveṁdaḍunnatiya nārppogaḷa rddharaṇīta ḷāgradoḷ . poḍa�pati kā
mēriya taḍiyoḷbiṭṭirdda tannadījaḷamuma nīkaḍalege ṟeyamṛtajaḷamuma noḍamoykane tūginōrppanabhivarṇnisi
da . raṁgattaraṁgamāḷābhaṁga radindeseva kaḍalegaṟe nōrppajanakkingaḍalaṁ dikkaripudadaṁ gaḍa pogaḷalke kamaḷabhavanuṁ neṟeya .
Intī dharmmamanārorvvarkkādu�vargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāge yargghyatīrttha gaṁge gaṁgāsāgara śrīparvvatameṁ
ba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ sāyirakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷo ḷkaṭṭisi mahāritvija rggubhayamu
khi goṭṭa phala midanaḷidananitumanaḷidu narakaṁbokka paṁcamahāpātakanakku . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vā yō�rē
ta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . svaṁ dātuṁ sumaha cchekyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya
pāḷanaṁ dānaṁ vā pāḷanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupāḷanaṁ . Aṁbudhiparivēṣṭita vasudhāṁbikege lalāmamenipa
vipragrāmaṁ poṁboḷala nāgadēvabudhaṁ budhatati meccekāvyamaṁ viracisida . © svasti śrīmatkuṟitakūṁ
ṭeyūroḍeya śvāmikumārasōmayājibhaṭṭōpādhyāyapramukha mahājanaviṇnūrvvaruṁ
śrīmadaṇuvēśvaradēvargge muḷgundada dāriyiṁ paḍuva nīrapaḷḷadiṁ teṁka vudakapāṣāṇa gaḷaṁ dirppattanālku
gēṇakōloḷu dēvaraṁgabhōganivēdyakke sarvvanamaśyamāgi biṭṭa matter 9 Intī dharmmava ninnūrvva ravara susva
dharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvar . parahitarinnūrvvara padasarasīruhāmōdamadhukaraṁ śivabhaktaṁ karavatiśaya
māgire vistaradiṁ kuḷakaraṇi mābalāryyaṁ bareda . purikarapaṭṭaṇōdbhavana kaṁṭada bammana putrana
yyaṇaṁ maravesedoppu viṭṭigeya dantada citrada śāstrayuktamāgire besageyva kalubhariva
kammaṟa vinnaṇadōjegelliyuṁ parikise viśvakarmmaninavaṁ migileṁbu daśēṣabhūtaḷa . Ōṁ namaśśivāya [.]
Digital edition of SII 11.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
